region_schema.meaning: Release markets/regions where the AVR model family is known or reasonably mapped as sold/released.

backend_schema.meaning: PlayBridge AVR control backend candidate for power, input switching, volume/mute, and status where available.

lineups.label: Denon AVR / AVC network receiver
lineups.region_notes: Denon AVR-X/AVC-X and AVR-S families sold broadly with regional model-prefix differences; IP/HEOS capabilities vary by model and settings.

lineups.label: Marantz NR / SR / Cinema network receiver
lineups.region_notes: Marantz NR/SR/Cinema families share Denon-Marantz control concepts; regional availability varies by distributor.

lineups.label: Yamaha MusicCast / YXC AV receiver
lineups.region_notes: MusicCast/YXC-capable RX-V, TSR, HTR and AVENTAGE network AV receivers; model names and availability vary by region.

lineups.label: Onkyo network AV receiver
lineups.region_notes: Network-enabled Onkyo TX-NR/TX-RZ families; post-2021 availability varies after ownership/distribution changes.

lineups.label: Integra network AV receiver
lineups.region_notes: Integra is strongest in custom-install channels, especially North America and Japan/Asia; regional availability can be narrow.

lineups.label: Pioneer / Elite network AV receiver
lineups.region_notes: Network-enabled Pioneer VSX/Elite receivers often share Onkyo/Pioneer control ecosystem; exact command coverage may vary.

lineups.label: Sony network AV receiver / ES receiver
lineups.platform: Sony Audio Control API / Music Center
lineups.region_notes: Sony network/ES models can use Sony Audio Control API style paths; non-network STR-DH models should use IR/CEC/custom only.

lineups.label: Anthem MRX / AVM network receiver or processor
lineups.region_notes: Anthem has IP/automation support but no first-class PlayBridge backend yet; use custom command profiles.

lineups.label: Arcam AVR / AV processor
lineups.region_notes: Arcam has custom-install control paths but no first-class PlayBridge backend yet; use custom command profiles.

lineups.label: NAD AV receiver
lineups.region_notes: NAD AV receivers/processors may expose BluOS/IP integrations, but PlayBridge should treat them as custom-command until a native backend exists.

models.name: AVR-X2900H
models.region_notes: 2026 X-Series; US uses the AVR- prefix, parts of UK/EU/Asia use AVC- for some X-series models. Confirm regional SKU.
models.control_notes: 2026 Denon X-Series 7.2ch (successor to AVR-X2800H), 32-bit DAC and Dirac Live; HEOS / Denon-Marantz IP control. Candidate mapping from 2026 launch coverage; requires network standby/IP control and real-device validation.

models.name: AVR-X3900H
models.region_notes: 2026 X-Series; sold as AVC-X3900H in parts of UK/EU/Asia. Confirm regional SKU.
models.control_notes: 2026 Denon X-Series up to 9.4ch with four subwoofer outputs (successor to AVR/AVC-X3800H), Dirac Live; HEOS / Denon-Marantz IP control. Candidate mapping from 2026 launch coverage; requires network standby/IP control and real-device validation.

models.name: AV 30
models.region_notes: 2026 Marantz separates pre/pro (paired with the AMP 30 power amp); availability via distributor.
models.control_notes: 2026 Marantz AV 30 11-channel preamp/processor (separate, not a receiver) sharing the Denon-Marantz HEOS/IP control path. Candidate mapping from 2026 launch coverage; requires network standby/IP control and real-device validation.

models.name: RX300A
models.region_notes: 2026 entry AVR (successor to RX-V385); ~June 2026 availability.
models.control_notes: 2026 Yamaha entry 5.2ch AVR. CAVEAT: entry-tier Yamaha AVRs may lack MusicCast / YXC network control (the predecessor RX-V385 had none) - confirm IP control is present, otherwise this is custom_command or uncontrollable. Candidate mapping, validate on the real device.

models.name: RX500A
models.region_notes: 2026 AVR introducing a new 7.2ch tier; ~September 2026 availability.
models.control_notes: 2026 Yamaha 7.2ch AVR (new tier). CAVEAT: confirm MusicCast / YXC network control is present on this entry-adjacent tier, otherwise this is custom_command. Candidate mapping, validate on the real device.

models.name: TX-RZ31
models.region_notes: CES 2026 RZ-series refresh; availability expected late 2026/early 2027.
models.control_notes: CES 2026 Onkyo RZ-series, 9-channel ~100 WPC, THX Select 2, new large front display; Onkyo eISCP/ISCP control. Candidate mapping from 2026 launch coverage; requires network standby/IP control and real-device validation.

models.name: DRX-R1
models.region_notes: Integra distributes mainly via US/Asia custom-install channels; EU/UK availability limited. Confirm region and model-year vs the 2024 DRX-5.4 generation.

models.name: AVA15
models.region_notes: Arcam Radia AVA line, debuted ISE 2026; dealer availability from Q3 2026. ~USD 3000.
models.control_notes: 2026 Arcam Radia AVA15 (Audio/Video Amplifier - no AM/FM tuner), Dirac Live ART; Arcam IP / RS232-style control with no first-class add-on driver, so custom_command. Candidate mapping, validate on the real device.

notes: All rows are candidate mappings and are not hardware validated.
Use model-family rows for wizard filtering; do not treat them as exact country SKU or suffix validation.
Network standby/IP control must usually be enabled on the AVR for reliable automation after power-off/standby.
Denon/Marantz region prefixes differ: AVR- is common in US, AVC- is common in parts of UK/EU/Asia for some X-series models.
